keywords.name: I am Avar Tar, slayer of monsters, saviour of princesses, and defender of the weak.
keywords.king: I am on a quest for the Thaian king ... as usual, of course.
keywords.tibianus: I am on a quest for the Thaian king ... as usual, of course.
keywords.quest: I am on a quest for the Thaian king ... as usual, of course.
keywords.army: Where the army fails a hero like me is needed.
keywords.ferumbras: I fought him serveral times, sometimes he killed me, sometimes I killed him, I would say we are even right now, but I am getting better and more powerful each day.
keywords.excalibug: I am sure it's hidden in a vault of the Nightmare Knights beneath the Plains of Havoc. I plan an expedition to go there and rout out the Ruthless Seven, but I have to save the world first.
keywords.thais: If I had the time I would restore peace in this once proud city, but there's too much to do before I can start that quest.
keywords.tibia: I've seen it all and done it all ... at least twice.
keywords.carlin: I saved the women there once or twice.
keywords.news: There is a great evil lurking beneath this isle ... and beneath the Plains of Havoc and in the ancient necropolis and beneath the Ghostlands ... well everywhere basically.
keywords.rumors: There is a great evil lurking beneath this isle ... and beneath the Plains of Havoc and in the ancient necropolis and beneath the Ghostlands ... well everywhere basically.
